## Checklist

- [ ] A failing test was written before the implementation
- [ ] All tests pass (`mvn test`)
- [ ] Change is scoped to what was discussed in the issue — no bonus features
- [ ] No Spring imports added to `domain/`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the feature set changed
- [ ] `PRD.md` updated if a backlog item was completed or added
